body.text: Decision day: SCOTUS could hand down Hemani and Wolford v. Lopez this morning

The Court could issue its two pending 2A merits decisions as soon as Thursday morning (still undecided overnight). Monday's orders denied cert in two NY challenges — Corbett and NSSF v. James — while granting 4 new cases and relisting 25.

facts.title: 1. SCOTUS Hemani & Wolford — opinions could land today
2. Virginia hardware ban — T-13 to July 1
3. Gun groups slam James Harden's TX arrest

body.text:
• SCOTUS: Hemani & Wolford could issue as soon as this morning
• SCOTUS Monday orders: Corbett & NSSF v. James denied; 4 granted, 25 relisted
• NRA/CCRKBA/GOA/FPC slam James Harden's unholstered-carry arrest (court Jun 22)
• Virginia hardware ban T-13 to July 1; no new filing
